No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus supports a contribution to eradicating poverty.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly aims to '促進身心發展及培養終身休閒運動' (promote physical and mental development and cultivate lifelong leisure sports), directly supporting Target 3.4 by preventing non-communicable diseases and promoting well-being.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and promotes a sustainable lifestyle skill through '培養終身休閒運動' (Target 4.7). Model A revised to match Model B's accurate assessment.

Gender Equality.reason: The course is explicitly '男女合班' (male and female co-ed), directly promoting equal participation and opportunities in sports, aligning with Target 5.5.
